_comment: Reusable component code (HTML/CSS/JS) the agent pulls and re-skins via frame.md. Heavy source lives in this repo; this is the index. Add one entry per component you promote. Format matches the skill's references/library/components.manifest.json.

components.name: Metric card (2x2 / 2x3 grid)
components.notes: Staggered pop-in + count-up; coral accent on the hero number. Numeric values count up, placeholders like [din siffra] stay static. 4 values = 2x2, 5-6 = 2x3. Never fabricate the number.

components.name: Claude Code prompt box
components.notes: Dark prompt box with a deterministic, frame-seekable typing animation, coral caret/cursor/send pill. Re-skin per video with frame.md.

components.name: Light-flare transition
components.notes: The signature transition. Soft warm sweep; the incoming shot is revealed at the flare's peak. Sync the peak to an SFX swoosh. 3-6 per short.

components.name: Split 50/50 (home-base layout)
components.notes: The home-base split scaffold: B-roll/graphics top (#topSlot), talking-head bottom (#headSlot), 1px seam hairline. Brand hook move — opens full-screen head, then the top panel slides down to form the split with a continuous Ken Burns push-in. Structure only; captions come from the separate caption-pill component.

components.name: Fullscreen talking head
components.notes: Full-frame head takeover on track 0 for hooks/CTAs/personal beats. Quick fade + scale settle on entry, then a gentle continuous Ken Burns push-in so it's never frozen. Optional lower-third vignette for caption legibility and an optional coral-ticked kicker. Real footage replaces the #head placeholder at build time; no caption drawn here.

components.name: Caption pill (signature caption)
components.notes: The library's centralized caption — a dark charcoal pill with bold white Inter, 1-3 word chunks that pop in and swap in sync with speech at the seam; one word per chunk may be highlighted in the brighter coral #ff9382 for contrast. Track 8, transparent ground to overlay other layers. Other components must NOT recreate a caption. Never fabricate copy.

components.name: Browser frame (window chrome for screenshots)
best_for: holding a SaaS UI / dashboard capture
components.notes: Rounded browser window with muted traffic-light dots and a pill address bar; slides up + scales in, then a slow Ken Burns push-in on the content. imageSrc fills the content area (object-fit cover, top-anchored), empty falls back to a neutral placeholder. The single coral accent is the tiny secure dot in the address bar.

components.name: UI highlight (spotlight overlay)
best_for: drawing attention to a UI element
components.notes: Transparent overlay (track 6) that dims the frame with a scrim except a clear spotlight rect via the box-shadow-hole trick, outlines it in coral, pops in an optional label + arrow, then keeps the border breathing. rect is in 1080x1920 px. Coral border + arrow share the one accent.

components.name: Workflow diagram (source → tool → output)
components.notes: Node-flow diagram (LinkedIn → Vayne → Spreadsheet); nodes stagger pop-in, connectors draw between them, coral accent on the hero (tool) node only. 2–4 nodes, vertical default or horizontal. Each node takes an optional `icon` (tool id from logos.manifest) that shows the real tool logo above the label. Never fabricate node labels.

components.name: CTA scene (closer + giant coral pill)
best_for: ending a short on a call to action
components.notes: Centered closer line (≤5 words) with one optional Instrument Serif italic WHITE accent word over a giant coral pill CTA (the frame's single coral instance) on a dark ground, plus a centered hairline; staggered reveal then pill overshoot then hairline draw, gentle push-in. Never fabricate copy.

components.name: Platform logo card (logo flash)
best_for: flashing one named tool's logo (~0.5-1s) when a tool is mentioned
components.notes: Reveals ONE tool logo big + centered on a brand ground with an optional Inter label and a single coral underline; the logo id maps to a local logos/<logo>.svg (18 tool marks bundled). Flash-in ~0.5s + gentle push-in.
